name: Kaia FIT
tagline: Functional fitness for women, by women
seoDescription: Kaia FIT Santa Rosa is a women's fitness studio on Airway Drive — cross-training, lift, barre, yoga, cycle, and 6-week BRIK bootcamps led by certified coaches, with nutrition support and a 5-star community.

sections.eyebrow: Santa Rosa, CA · Women's Fitness Studio
sections.heading: Build a strong body and a powerful mind
sections.subheading: Kaia FIT is functional fitness for women, by women — cross-training, lift, barre, yoga, and 6-week bootcamps led by certified coaches on Airway Drive. All levels, all welcome.

image.alt: Kaia FIT members in a team huddle, hands stacked in the center after a workout

sections.heading: Fitness designed for real life
sections.intro: Kaia is built on three pillars — train smart, eat well, and show up for each other. One membership covers all of it.

items.title: Muscle confusion that works
items.body: Coaches never repeat the same workout — because routine is the enemy of results. Functional cardio, strength, and mobility keep your body guessing and improving.

items.title: Nutrition coaching
items.body: Certified coaches help you build a healthy relationship with food and learn to eat lean and green — habits that fit real life, not a crash diet.

items.title: A community that shows up
items.body: Results-driven fitness with a powerful community. Kaia is truly for everyone, and all are welcome here.

sections.heading: Many ways to move, one membership
sections.intro: Cross-training is our signature, but Kaia members can mix and match the whole schedule — no second gym required.

items.title: Cross-Training
items.description: Our signature class — a unique mix of high-intensity cardio, functional movement, and both weighted and non-weighted exercises.

items.title: Lift
items.description: A strength class designed to build lean muscle, improve bone density, boost metabolism, and grow your confidence.

items.title: Barre
items.description: A low-impact blend of postures inspired by ballet, yoga, Pilates, and Kaia — sculpting strength with control.

items.title: Yoga
items.description: Power yoga and core work with Pilates-style technique — mind and body in one weekly reset.

items.title: Cycle
items.description: A cardio-based, calorie-torching ride with certified spin instructors. It's a party on a bike.

items.title: TRX® Suspension
items.description: Bodyweight suspension training that builds strength, power, endurance, mobility, balance, and core stability all at once.

sections.heading: Functional fitness for women, by women
body: Kaia FIT Santa Rosa is a women's fitness studio on Airway Drive built around a simple promise: build a strong body and a powerful mind. We blend cross-training, lift, barre, yoga, and cycle into one membership so members can train their whole body without juggling separate gyms.

Head coach and owner Lacey is a NASM-certified personal trainer and group fitness coach who leads a team that gives individual attention in every class. Together they coach women of every level, with modifications and progressions that keep training safe, sustainable, and motivating — backed by the Kaia method that's helped women rediscover fitness since 2009.
highlights: Modifications and progressions for every level

image.alt: The Kaia FIT coaching team and community in matching Kaia FIT apparel

items.quote: Love Kaia!! Awesome workouts for every level, amazing coaches that provide individual attention, nutrition coaching, and incredibly supportive Kaia sisters that support your journey.
items.author: Heather D.

items.quote: I've dropped into a few classes here and I love the energy here.
items.author: Yesenia C.

items.quote: Lacey does an amazing job and is so encouraging.
items.author: Yesenia C.

sections.heading: Your first class is the hardest. We've got the rest.
sections.body: Find us at 3451 Airway Dr, Santa Rosa. Call (707) 526-8944 to try a class — all levels, all welcome.

sections.heading: One membership. The whole studio.
sections.subheading: Mix and match cross-training, strength, barre, yoga, cycle, and suspension — plus our three signature 6-week bootcamps a year.

sections.heading: Find your class
sections.intro: One membership covers every class on the schedule — mix and match to match your week.

items.title: Cross-Training
items.description: Our signature session — high-intensity cardio, functional movement, and weighted and non-weighted exercises that build a strong, capable body.

items.title: Lift
items.description: A dedicated strength class to build lean muscle, improve bone density, boost metabolism, and grow your confidence under the bar.

items.title: Barre
items.description: Low-impact and precise — postures inspired by ballet, yoga, Pilates, and Kaia that sculpt strength with control.

items.title: Yoga
items.description: Power yoga and core-strengthening work with Pilates-style technique, connecting mind and body each week.

items.title: Cycle
items.description: A cardio-based, calorie-torching ride led by certified spin instructors. It's a party on a bike.

items.title: TRX® Suspension & Run
items.description: Suspension training for full-body strength and balance, plus run sessions that build speed, endurance, and stamina.

sections.heading: BRIK — the 6-Week Bootcamp
sections.body: Kaia's signature BRIK bootcamp is six focused weeks of training and nutrition built to help you reach your potential — strong body, powerful mind. Ask the studio about the next round.
points: Coached every step, for every level

items.q: Do I need to be in shape to start?
items.a: No. Every class has modifications and progressions, and Kaia is truly for everyone — all levels are welcome here.

items.q: Does one membership cover every class?
items.a: Yes. Cross-training, lift, barre, yoga, cycle, and more are all included — no second gym required.

items.q: How do I try a class?
items.a: Call (707) 526-8944 or stop by 3451 Airway Dr, Santa Rosa — we'll get you set up.

sections.heading: Come move with us
sections.body: Find us at 3451 Airway Dr, Santa Rosa. Call (707) 526-8944 to try a class.

pages.label: About
pages.title: About
pages.description: Kaia FIT Santa Rosa — a women's fitness studio led by NASM-certified head coach Lacey and a team of certified coaches.

sections.heading: Coached by women who get it
sections.subheading: A 5-star women's fitness community on Airway Drive, built on training, nutrition, and showing up for each other.

image.alt: The Kaia FIT coaching team and community in matching Kaia FIT apparel

sections.heading: Build a strong body and a powerful mind
body: Kaia FIT is functional fitness for women, by women. At our Santa Rosa studio on Airway Drive, we bring cross-training, lift, barre, yoga, and cycle under one membership — so members can train the whole body in a place that feels like a community, not a chore.

Head coach and owner Lacey is a NASM-certified personal trainer and group fitness coach who leads a team built on individual attention in every class. With modifications and progressions for every level, plus nutrition coaching and a community that genuinely supports each other, Kaia delivers results designed for real life — the same approach the Kaia method has used to help women rediscover fitness since 2009.
highlights: Functional fitness for women, by women
